title: Thai Chicken Satay
description: A classic Thai street food dish featuring marinated chicken skewers grilled to perfection. Serve with peanut sauce for a delicious snack or appetizer.
instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, combine flaxseed oil, fish sauce, and portuguese red pepper flakes. Blend until smooth.
2. Add minced roasted garlic and blend until well combined.
3. In a large bowl, combine chicken pieces and marinade. Mix well to coat.
4. Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
6. Thread marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
7. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until chicken is cooked through.
8. Serve skewers hot with peanut sauce for dipping.
